skills.name: apple-notes
skills.description: Manage Apple Notes via the memo CLI on macOS. Use when the user asks to add a note, list notes, search notes, or manage note folders.

skills.name: files
skills.description: Basic file operations via run_command. Use when the user asks to list files, show file contents, search within files, or inspect directories.

skills.name: git
skills.description: Basic Git operations via run_command. Use when the user asks to check status, diff, log, branch, or perform simple git commands.

skills.name: weather
skills.description: Get current weather and forecasts (no API key required). Uses Open-Meteo.

skills.name: bluesky
skills.description: Post to Bluesky (AT Protocol). Use when the user asks to post a tweet/thread to Bluesky, share content on Bluesky, or post news from a URL.

skills.name: news
skills.description: Fetch news and articles via the Perigon API. Use when the user asks for news, headlines, or articles on a topic.

skills.name: portal-integrations
skills.description: Use connected apps (Gmail, Calendar, Zoom, Slack, GitHub, etc.) via the Portal. List connections with list_integrations_connections, then use connection_id in provider tools.
